questions.q: What is the coordination number of the central metal atom in the complex [Ni(CN)4]2-?
Which of the following complexes will exhibit the highest paramagnetic behaviour? (A) [Fe(H2O)6]3+ (B) [Fe(CN)6]3- (C) [Fe(C2O4)3]3- (D) [Fe(NH3)6]3+
Write the IUPAC name of the complex [Pt(NH3)2Cl2].
State the hybridisation and magnetic character of [CoF6]3- ion.
Arrange the following complexes in the increasing order of their stability: [Fe(H2O)6]3+, [Fe(NH3)6]3+, [Fe(C2O4)3]3-
True or False: The complex [Ni(CO)4] is paramagnetic.
What type of isomerism is exhibited by the complex [Ma3b2c] and [Mab2ca]?
Fill in the blank: The complex _______ exhibits optical isomerism.
State the type of hybridisation of the central metal atom in the complex [Cu(NH3)4]2+.
Compare the stability of the complexes [Fe(CN)6]3- and [Fe(H2O)6]3+ on the basis of ligand field strength.
questions.answer: [Fe(CN)6]3- is more stable than [Fe(H2O)6]3+ due to higher ligand field strength of CN- ligand
